name: proxy
description: Set machine-scope http_proxy/https_proxy/no_proxy env vars to match mastw (Weizmann web proxy).
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "${expected}='http://bcproxy.weizmann.ac.il:8080'; ${got}=[Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('http_proxy','Machine'); ${log}=Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\proxy-verify.log'; if (${got} -eq ${expected}) { Set-Content -Path ${log} -Value ('http_proxy=' + ${got}); Set-Content -Path (Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\proxy-smoke.txt') -Value 'proxy_ok' } else { ('http_proxy mismatch: got=' + ${got} + ' expected=' + ${expected}) | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }"
